title: oreostemma alpigenum var. andersonii
intro: Oreostemma alpigenum var. andersonii, also known as a variety of the Oreostemma alpigenum plant, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and Mexico. This plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The sesquiterpene lactones in Oreostemma alpigenum var. andersonii have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Oreostemma alpigenum var. andersonii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
